final_answer: The Oceanview Inn offered a pleasant environment, though some maintenance issues marred the stay. Specifically, the air conditioning struggled in the third floor suite. We reached out to customer service regarding a broken minibar unit. The response was polite initially, but the timeline promised was inaccurate. Eventually, the repair was completed. While we appreciate that customer service attempted to rectify the matter, their lack of transparency remains problematic. Additionally, housekeeping duties were sporadic throughout the evening. Ultimately, the value proposition did not justify the initial inconveniences encountered on site.<|im_end|>
